T0388.title: One ID, One Card
T0388.definition: A simplified loan application model requiring only an ID card and a bank card, commonly seen in car loan fraud.
T0388.description: Exploiting lax review processes at some financial institutions, fraud rings apply for car loans using only an ID and bank card. In practice, they often forge supporting documents like driver's licenses to pass verification. This model is easily exploited for 'buy-and-cash-out' fraud schemes.
T0388.usageExample: Two IDs one card, credit record, settle at 5.7; One ID one card, credit record, settle at 5.

references.title: 2024 H1 Credit Fraud Risk Landscape Report
Black Market Big Data: Exposing Malicious Loan Brokers
